Angle.Summary: Returns a random angle in [0, 2 PI)

Bool.Summary: Returns a random bool with of returning true.

Chance.Summary:
Returns a random bool with of returning true.
An alias for Rand.Bool().

Sign.Summary: Returns a random integer direction -1 or 1

Vector2Float.Summary: Returns random 2D direction within of a .

Vector2FloatFloat.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [, )

Vector2Vector2.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [.x, .y)

FloatFloatFloatFloat.Summary:
Returns random 3D direction within the given theta and phi ranges.
Takes Theta and Phi in degrees.
Theta takes values (0,360) values outside this range will contine to rotate CC facing down at the XZ plane.
Phi takes values (0,180) values above will snap back to 0 and below will snap back to 180.

Vector3FloatFloat.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [, )

Vector3Vector2.Summary: Returns the direction rotated by a random value in [.x, .y)

Color.Summary: Returns a random color in , , and .

List.Summary: Picks a single item from using uniform random sampling.
List.param: The collection to pick an item from. Must be non-empty.

ListList.Summary:
Picks a single item from using weighting random sampling.
Consider using the faseter Rand.Items() for multiple picks.
ListList.param: The collection to pick an item from. Must be non-empty.

WeightedList.Summary:
Picks a single item from using uniform random sampling.
Consider using the faster Rand.Items() for multiple picks.
WeightedList.param: The weighted list to pick an item from. Must be non-empty.

ItemsWithReplacement.ListInt:
Picks items from using uniform random sampling with replacement.
The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty. Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative. An array containing the picked items.

ListListInt.Summary: Picks items from using weighted random sampling with replacement.
ListListInt.param: The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty.
Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListListInt.Returns: An array containing the picked items.

WeightedListInt.Summary: Picks items from using weighted random sampling with replacement.
WeightedListInt.param: The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty.
Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
The number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
WeightedListInt.Returns: An array containing the picked items.

ListInt.Summary:
Picks items from using uniform random sampling without replacement.
Consider using the faster Rand.ItemsExtract() if mutation is acceptable.
ListInt.param: The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty.
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListInt.Returns: An array containing the picked items.

ListListInt.Summary: Picks items from using weighted random sampling without replacement.
ListListInt.param: The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty.
Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListListInt.Returns: An array containing the picked items.

WeightedListInt.Summary: Picks items from using weighted random sampling without replacement.
WeightedListInt.param: The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty.
Weights associated with each item by index. Must be the same length as .
Number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
WeightedListInt.Returns: An array containing the picked items.

ListInt.Summary:
Picks items from using uniform random sampling without replacement.
Picked items are removed and relative order is destroyed.
Time Complexity: O(k)
Consider using the slower Rand.ItemsWithoutReplacement() if mutation is not acceptable.
ListInt.param: The collection to pick items from. Must be non-empty.
The number of items to pick. Must be non-negative.
ListInt.Returns: An array containing the picked items.

Index.Summary:
Picks a single index from using uniform random sampling with replacement.
Time Complexity: O(k)
Index.param: The collection to pick an index from. Must be non-empty.

Shuffle.Summary: Shuffles in place in O(n) time.
